## Mob Generation Pipeline -- Full Implementation Plan

### 1. Architecture Overview

The pipeline has three runtime contexts:

**A. commons-server (TypeScript/Bun)** -- the game server. This is where the dungeon runs. It needs to:
- Trigger mob generation when a player presses Start
- Query the mob cache (SQLite) for pre-generated mobs
- Fall back to DEFAULT_ENEMY_VARIANTS if cache is cold
